docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,522.00 FILED BY QUINTERO, DAMARY AS TO DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUINTERO, DAMARY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED JUN-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTERO, DAMARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL $5,522.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,522.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR QUINTERO, DAMARY ASSIGNED TO PREMIER JUDICIAL ENFORCEMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5,500.88 ACCRUED INTEREST, $98.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUINTERO, DAMARY AS TO DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTERO, DAMARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL $11,165.88 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,165.88
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YOS, MANUEL HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MANUEL YOS ON SEP-23-2020 - DENIED. ASSIGNEE OF RECORD ON THE JUDGMENT RICHARD HALKET IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MANUEL YOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT - DENIED
